name: SoundCloud
description: Specs and technical requirements for SoundCloud tracks, playlists, profiles, and creator content.

items.name: Track Upload
items.notes: 320 kbps MP3 or lossless WAV/FLAC recommended for best streaming quality

items.name: Track Duration
items.limit: No hard limit (Next Pro); up to 3 hours recommended
items.notes: Free accounts limited to 3 hours total upload time across all tracks

items.name: Streaming Bitrate
items.notes: SoundCloud transcodes to 128 kbps MP3 (standard) or 256 kbps AAC (Go+ subscribers); upload the highest quality source file

items.name: Track / Playlist Artwork
items.notes: Square format required; displayed alongside waveform player

items.name: Profile Header
items.notes: Wide banner shown at top of profile page

items.name: Profile Photo / Avatar
items.notes: Displayed as a circle in comments and followers lists

items.name: Track Description
items.notes: Supports plain text; first ~100 characters shown in embeds

items.name: Username / URL
items.notes: Alphanumeric, hyphens, and underscores; used in the permalink URL

items.name: Audio Ad
items.notes: Served between tracks on free accounts; 44.1 kHz, 192 kbps minimum

items.name: Display Companion Ad
items.notes: Shown alongside audio ad; standard IAB medium rectangle
